title: Random Fruit lore
description: Test more of your devil fruit knowlodge with this quiz.

questions.question: What was the name Luffy's Gum-Gum Fruit was secretly known as, revealed to be a Mythical Zoan?
options: Human-Human Fruit, Model: Sun God Nika
God-God Fruit, Model: Nika
Warrior-Warrior Fruit, Model: Nika
Rubber-Rubber Fruit, True Form: Nika

questions.question: Who originally possessed the Swim-Swim Fruit (Sui Sui no Mi) before Senor Pink obtained it?
options: Corazon
Buffalo
A member of Doflamingo's previous crew
It is not stated who had it before

questions.question: What is the name of Sengoku's Devil Fruit, and what does it allow him to transform into?
options: Human-Human Fruit, Model: Daibutsu - Golden Buddha
God-God Fruit - Model: Buddha
Holy-Holy Fruit - Divine giant
Zoan-type - Colossal monk

questions.question: What unique trait does the Tori Tori no Mi, Model: Phoenix (Marco's fruit) grant beyond flight?
options: Immunity to all Devil Fruit powers
Regenerative flames that can heal wounds
The ability to teleport short distances
The power to revive other people from death

questions.question: The Fish-Fish Fruit, Model: Azure Dragon is which type of Devil Fruit, and who ate it?
options: Ancient Zoan, Kaidou
Mythical Zoan, Kaidou
Mythical Zoan, Big Mom
Logia, Shanks

questions.question: What does the Memo-Memo Fruit (Memo Memo no Mi) allow its user to do?
options: Erase their own memory to resist mind-reading
Physically extract, edit, and reinsert people's memories like film strips
Copy the memories of anyone they touch
Implant false memories into enemies

questions.question: Which Devil Fruit user can drain liquids from living beings?
options: Corazon
Señor Pink
Charlotte Smoothie
Charlotte Daifuku

questions.question: What is special about the Jacket-Jacket Fruit (Jake Jake no Mi) eaten by Kelly Funk?
options: The user can transform into a full suit of armor worn by others
The user can become any article of clothing
The user can become a jacket worn by another person, controlling them
It allows the user to zip into and hijack another person's body

questions.question: What was the name of the Marine scientist who created artificial Devil Fruits, and what was his first replica of?
options: Vegapunk, Fish-Fish Fruit, Model: Azure Dragon
Caesar Clown, Sala-Sala Fruit, Model: Axolotl
Caesar Clown, Gas-Gas Fruit
Dr. Indigo, Tremor-Tremor Fruit

questions.question: The Hana Hana no Mi (Flower-Flower Fruit) has a unique pain mechanic. What is it?
options: Any damage dealt to bloomed body parts is reflected back at the attacker
Any damage dealt to bloomed body parts is felt by the user's main body
The user cannot feel pain in their main body while blooms are active
Bloomed limbs are indestructible but the main body becomes vulnerable

questions.question: What is the name of the fruit eaten by Kozuki Toki that allowed her to send people forward in time?
options: Time-Time Fruit
Warp-Warp Fruit
Future-Future Fruit
Drift-Drift Fruit

questions.question: What can happen to a Zoan user who pushes their fruit's awakening without strong willpower?
options: They permanently lose their human form
The animal personality takes over and the human mind is suppressed
Their power becomes permanently weaker
They enter an unawakened berserk state

questions.question: What is unique about how Kaido's Fish-Fish Fruit, Mythical Zoan: Azure Dragon was obtained by him?
options: He stole it from a World Noble
It was delivered to him by Rocks D. Xebec
It was given to him by Big Mom
Shanks' crew stole it from Kaido and it was later returned
